readme:
### What it does

Vultr GPU Compute Infrastructure provides comprehensive control over Vultr's GPU-oriented services through 50 MCP tools. Provision VMs and bare metal, manage serverless inference, configure DNS and firewalls, take snapshots, and track billing — all from your AI agent.

### Tool coverage

| Domain | Tools | What you can do |
|--------|-------|-----------------|
| Instances | 11 | List, get, status, bandwidth, create, delete, start, stop, reboot, update, reverse DNS |
| Bare Metal | 9 | List, get, bandwidth, plans, create, delete, start, stop, reboot |
| Inference | 5 | List, get, create, delete subscriptions, track usage |
| DNS | 5 | List domains, list/create/update/delete records |
| Firewall | 6 | List/get/create/delete groups, list/create rules |
| Snapshots | 4 | List, get, create, delete |
| Scripts | 4 | List, get, create, delete startup scripts |
| Reference | 4 | Plans (GPU specs + pricing), regions, OS images, SSH keys |
| Account | 2 | Account info, billing history |

### GPU provisioning flow

List GPU plans (`type=vcg`), pick a region, select an OS image, inject cloud-init user_data (installs Docker + NVIDIA toolkit + pulls your OCI image), attach a firewall group and startup script, and create. Poll status until `server_status=ok`. Snapshot before teardown. Delete when done.

### Token efficiency

Formatters strip ~60% of Vultr's verbose API responses. Plans prominently display GPU specs (type, VRAM, count) and pricing. Inference API keys are masked. Responses are capped at 4000 characters with pagination guidance.

### Safety

All 24 write operations require dual confirmation: `VULTR_WRITE_ENABLED=true` environment variable AND `confirm: true` per-call parameter. Creating instances and bare metal incurs compute charges immediately.

env.name: VULTR_API_KEY
env.description: Vultr API key for authentication — all tools require this

env.name: VULTR_WRITE_ENABLED
env.description: Set to 'true' to enable write operations (create, delete, start, stop, reboot)

setup.blurb: GPU compute infrastructure — 50 tools for VMs, bare metal, inference, DNS, firewall, snapshots, and billing across Vultr's global datacentres.
setup.help_text: Create an API key at my.vultr.com/settings/#settingsapi. The key provides access to your Vultr account including creating instances (which incur compute charges).

fields.label: API Key
fields.help: Full-access API key. Instance creation incurs GPU compute charges immediately.

scenarios.label: Provision a GPU VM with cloud-init
scenarios.body: List GPU plans, pick the cheapest A100, select a region near you, create an instance with cloud-init user_data that installs Docker and pulls a GPU worker image, then poll status until ready.

scenarios.label: Cost audit — find idle instances
scenarios.body: List all instances, check their power status and cost, identify stopped instances still incurring charges, and delete any that are no longer needed.

scenarios.label: Compare GPU plan pricing
scenarios.body: List all GPU plans with pricing, sort by hourly cost, and identify the best value for A100, L40S, and A16 GPU types across regions.

notes: First-party Stallari blade MCP. Reference implementation for virtualisation-v1, serverless-v1, and dns-v1 contracts. TypeScript, dual transport (stdio + HTTP). GPU-first defaults. 50 tools, 74 tests, dual write-gate pattern.
